ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist or band */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Measure of the artist's popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the artists table */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of how suitable a track is for dancing */,
  "energy" REAL /* Measure of the perceived energy of a track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Measure of the loudness of a track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of the presence of spoken words in a track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Measure of the presence of musical instruments in a track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of the presence of a live audience in a track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of the musical positiveness conveyed by a track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Estimated tempo of a track in beats per minute */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the artists table */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre associated with the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the playlist */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the playlist (public or private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the playlists table */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the music_tracks table */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_track_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the music_tracks table */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, play) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)
